headline: Semicap stocks: Morgan Stanley raises WFE outlook and shifts ratings
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley raised its outlook for the semiconductor capital equipment cycle, lifting wafer fab equipment (WFE) forecasts and reshuffling ratings across key industry names as it flagged stronger NAND momentum and a longer cycle than previously expected.

raw.headline: Semicap stocks: Morgan Stanley raises WFE outlook and shifts ratings

headline: How The Man Group (LSE:EMG) Narrative Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Tighten Around £3
summary: The latest update on Man Group’s valuation edges fair value to £3.02 from £3.01, underlining how tightly clustered analyst expectations are around the high £2 range. Those small moves mirror a research backdrop where some analysts are nudging targets up toward about £2.90, while others are trimming by only a few pence, keeping the overall spread relatively narrow. Read on to see how to track these shifts and make sense of what they might mean for your own view on the stock. Stay updated as...
